description: Regression guard for the qwen3:8b fail-storm bug (2026-04-15). When patch_file returns a context-mismatch error, the agent must re-read the file and try again with corrected context, NOT retry the same broken diff 25 times. max_tool_calls=6 is the hard cap — if the agent storms, this trajectory trips.
user_turns: In src/main.rs, change the string 'hello' to 'hi'. Use patch_file.
